context.note: No database migrations required - uses existing data with aggregation queries
context.failure_volume: failure_volume = failure_rate × total_runs / 100 Used to prioritize tests that are both unreliable AND frequently run

objective.goal: Enable "Most Failing" tab in Test Explorer
Display tests ranked by failure rate
Link to error pattern data from Phase 05 (if available)

success_criteria.criterion: Most Failing tab enabled in Explorer
Tests sorted by failure rate (highest first)
Last error message shows in tooltip
Error pattern hash links to pattern (if Phase 05 done)

endpoint.description: Get most failing tests with failure metrics

testing_checklist.test: Most Failing tab enabled in Explorer
Tests sorted by failure rate (highest first)
Last error message shows in tooltip
Error pattern hash links to pattern (if Phase 05 done)
